creator: johans@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am no fan of ports using unreleased development versions. Although new features are nice, these packages tend to have untested code and support from upstream authors may be limited, unless you keep updating frequently.

I would be happy to commit this as a separate port, games/xboard-devel, if you are interested in maintaining it. But I'd like to keep games/xboard tracking the official releases.

Note that the zippy option from PR 192669 has been committed to games/xboard.
